title: AutoRewards
description: Effortless scheduled rewards for active players!
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

AutoRewards is a plugin that automatically rewards players based on configurable time intervals. It eliminates the need for manual intervention and ensures that active players are consistently rewarded for their presence. Perfect for server owners who want to motivate their players to stay engaged without having to remember to hand out rewards themselves! [More detailed description here.](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/resource-detail/29)

Check out AshSource for more plugins and resources [ashsource.ashkiano.com](https://ashsource.ashkiano.com/)
 
Are you a developer?
